name: quality-policy
description: Defines extraction quality standards for the Layer 3 Extraction Manager — minimum thresholds for DOM completeness, asset completeness, image coverage, SEO completeness, schema completeness, and overall extraction score.

minimumDomCompleteness.description: Minimum percentage of DOM elements successfully extracted

minimumAssetCompleteness.description: Minimum percentage of assets (images, videos, downloads) successfully extracted

minimumImageCoverage.description: Minimum percentage of product images successfully extracted

minimumSeoCompleteness.description: Minimum percentage of SEO fields (title, meta description, keywords) successfully extracted

minimumSchemaCompleteness.description: Minimum percentage of schema.org structured data successfully extracted

minimumExtractionScore.description: Minimum overall extraction quality score (weighted average of all dimensions)

qualityDimensions.description: Weights for each quality dimension in overall score

enforcement.description: Quality validation is advisory — low-quality extractions are flagged but not blocked
